final_prompt_summary: Show a homeowner calmly migrating a mixed smart-home setup from an older cloud-dependent hub to a local mini PC controller on a warm residential sideboard.
visual_direction: Photorealistic TaraHome editorial cover with warm residential materials, natural lighting, restrained dark-green accents, and physically plausible unbranded smart-home hardware.
constraints: no brand logos, readable screens, words, headline, or watermark
no chart, graph, diagram, or split-screen comparison
no routing, network, or decorative path lines
no translucent panels, floating UI cards, inset frames, or progress bars
no invented branded product design or distorted hardware
must remain clear at 16:10 article-hero and 16:9 article-card crops
